infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to capture accurate GPS coordinates with photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs access to your location to capture accurate GPS coordinates with photos.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to capture photos with GPS metadata.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to save captured photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app needs permission to add photos to your library.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to save photos to your library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to add photos to your library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location to capture accurate GPS coordinates with photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to capture photos with GPS metadata.
